A copy of the press release announcing the agreement is filed herewith as Exhibit 99.
The information in the press release is being furnished, not filed, pursuant to
Company (the Company) issued a press release announcing its proposal to acquire Cogent, Inc. (Cogent) in a cash tender offer for $10.50 per share.

Other Events   On March 26, 2010, 3M Company issued a press release describing the one-time charge the Company expects to take in the first quarter of 2010 as a result of the Patient Protection and Affordable Care Act signed by the President on March 23, 2010, including modifications made in the Health Care and Education Reconciliation Act of 2010
Other Events   On August 2, 2005, 3M Company issued a press release announcing the completion of its acquisition of CUNO Incorporated.
A copy of the press release is attached as an exhibit to this Report and incorporated herein by reference.
